name: arc
description: CLI-first ARC paper, research-domain, and report typesetting tools.

interface.shortDescription: Paper query, research workflows, PDF typesetting, and translation
interface.longDescription: Agent Skills and lazy-installed CLIs for cache-first paper access, research-domain construction, planning, calculation, typesetting, and translation. MCP is available as a separate optional plugin.
defaultPrompt: Build a research domain from arXiv:0911.3380
Convert a Markdown report to PDF
